dataset_name: List of Countries by GDP Sector Composition

fields.name: Index Number
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents a unique sequential identifier assigned to each country or entry in the list of countries by their GDP sector composition.

fields.name: Rank
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Rank" field indicates the relative position of each country in the GDP sector composition list, ordered by a specific metric such as sectoral GDP percentage, with "-" possibly denoting missing or unranked entries.

fields.name: Country/Economy
fields.sample_values: Afghanistan, Albania, Algeria, American Samoa, Andorra, ..., West Bank, Western Sahara, Yemen, Zambia, Zimbabwe
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field identifies the name of a country, territory, or economy, serving as a categorical label for regional entities in international economic data, specifically GDP sector composition.

fields.name: GDP (millions of $)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the gross domestic product (GDP) value, measured in millions of US dollars, for each country, indicating the overall economic output relevant to sector composition analysis.

fields.name: Agriculture GDP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Agriculture GDP" field represents the monetary value (likely in millions or thousands of dollars) contributed by the agriculture sector to a country's total GDP, as recorded in national economic statistics.

fields.name: Agriculture Sector GDP Rank
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates each country's rank based on the GDP contribution of the agriculture sector, showing its relative position among all countries in agricultural economic output.

fields.name: Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the percentage share of a country's Gross Domestic Product (GDP) that is attributed to its agriculture sector, indicating the relative economic contribution of agriculture within its economy.

fields.name: IndustryGDP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: IndustryGDP represents the monetary value (likely in millions or billions of a specified currency) contributed by the industrial sector to each country's gross domestic product (GDP) in a comparative international context.

fields.name: IndustryRank
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: IndustryRank indicates the ranking position of a country based on the size or contribution of its industrial sector to GDP, with "-" likely denoting missing or unranked entries.

fields.name: Industry%ofGDP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the percentage share of a country's Gross Domestic Product (GDP) contributed by the industrial sector, indicating the relative economic importance of industries such as manufacturing, mining, and construction in each country.

fields.name: ServicesGDP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The ServicesGDP field represents the total monetary value (in millions or thousands of currency units) generated by the services sector of a country's economy, indicating its contribution to national GDP.

fields.name: ServicesRank
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: ServicesRank indicates each country's ranking position based on the size or proportion of its services sector within its overall GDP, with lower numbers suggesting higher rankings.

fields.name: Services%ofGDP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the percentage share of the services sector in a country's total Gross Domestic Product (GDP), indicating how much of the economy is driven by services such as finance, healthcare, and education.

fields.name: Year GDP
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the calendar year for which the GDP sector composition data is reported for each country, specifying the timeframe of measurement within the economic dataset.

fields.name: Year Sector
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the specific year or fiscal year associated with the GDP sector composition data for each country, specifying the time period of measurement or reporting.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: List_of_Countries_by_GDP_Sector_Composition (230 rows × 15 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 1.csv (Dataset: List of Countries by GDP Sector Composition)

### Schema (15 fields)
  - Index Number  -- type: int64, values: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, ..., 225, 226, 227, 228, 229
  - Rank -- type: object, values: -, 1, 10, 100, 101, ..., 95, 96, 97, 98, 99
  - Country/Economy -- type: object, values: Afghanistan, Albania, Algeria, American Samoa, Andorra, ..., West Bank, Western Sahara, Yemen, Zambia, Zimbabwe
  - GDP (millions of $) -- type: object, values: -, 10, 10070, 100900, 1028, ..., 9410, 95000, 9740, 9770, 9828
  - Agriculture GDP -- type: object, values: -, 1, 10, 101, 1010, ..., 9635, 966, 99, 991020, 992
  - Agriculture Sector GDP Rank -- type: object, values: -, 1, 10, 100, 101, ..., 95, 96, 97, 98, 99
  - Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution -- type: object, values: -, 0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, ..., 9.4, 9.6, 9.7, 9.8, 9.9
  - IndustryGDP -- type: object, values: -, 10209, 102198, 1036, 107191, ..., 96248, 97, 989, 99, 9906
  - IndustryRank -- type: object, values: -, 1, 10, 100, 101, ..., 95, 96, 97, 98, 99
  - Industry%ofGDP -- type: object, values: -, 0, 10, 10.1, 10.5, ..., 7.6, 7.7, 8.9, 9.1, 9.9
  - ServicesGDP -- type: object, values: -, 10082, 10186, 10312, 10369, ..., 94970, 968, 969794, 977170, 991
  - ServicesRank -- type: object, values: -, 1, 10, 100, 101, ..., 95, 96, 97, 98, 99
  - Services%ofGDP -- type: object, values: -, 100, 27, 28.4, 32.5, ..., 91.3, 92.7, 93.3, 93.8, 96
  - Year GDP  -- type: object, values: -, 2003, 2005, 2008, 2009, ..., 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017
  - Year Sector -- type: object, values: -, 2000, 2002, 2003, 2006, ..., 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, FY12/13
